description: Long-running harness checklist. Agents must not delete entries or edit descriptions/steps except to fix obvious typos with human approval. Only the passes field may change from false to true after verification.

features.description: Agent has read harness/README.md and run harness/scripts/bootstrap.sh at least once this session
steps: Open harness/README.md
Run ./harness/scripts/bootstrap.sh from repo root
Confirm working directory is the repository root

features.description: Python unittest suite passes via harness verify (matches CI python unit-test discovery)
steps: Install Python deps: pip install -r requirements.txt (and pytest if tests import it)
Run ./harness/scripts/verify.sh from repo root
Resolve failures before marking passes; treat script output as evaluator, not self-check

features.description: Node workspaces build and tests pass when changing backend, frontend, or shared
steps: npm install at repo root
npm run build --workspace shared
npm run test:ci --workspace backend
npm test --workspace frontend

features.description: Large or ambiguous product change follows OpenSpec proposal workflow before implementation
steps: Read openspec/AGENTS.md when the request matches proposal triggers
Scaffold or update change under openspec/changes/<id>/ and validate with openspec validate --strict
N/A for bug fixes restoring spec behavior, typos, or tests for existing behavior

features.description: Unified telemetry (UT_2026_04) wired to ingest: shared zod + backend validation + optional CI schema check
steps: Read docs/contracts/unified-telemetry/README.md and schemas/unified_telemetry/ut_event_union.schema.json
OpenSpec change add-unified-telemetry-ingest; archive when deployed
Mirror schema in shared/ and reject invalid payloads at API boundary (done: /api/ingest/unified-telemetry)
Mark passes only after backend tests pass (npm run test:ci --workspace backend)

features.description: PRD v1 behavioral observability canonical in artifacts + phased checklist hooks
steps: Read artifacts/PRD_V1_BEHAVIORAL_OBSERVABILITY.md
Use prd-phase-01..04 for build sequencing; harness-004 (OpenSpec) before breaking API/schema work

features.description: PRD Phase 1 — Core engine: ingestion, normalization, execution_id resolution, trace reconstruction
steps: Ingestion: strict canonical validation, append-only store (align POST /api/events and any parallel ingest paths)
Normalization: map workflow_run_id / run_id to execution_id; preserve agent_run_id, chat_id lineage
Trace reconstruction: order events per execution; retry, step, and tool-call grouping

features.description: PRD Phase 2 — Signal detection + deterministic pattern classification (PRD §14–§15)
steps: Implement signals: iteration depth, verification, recovery, abandonment, latency, disposition
Implement mutually exclusive patterns with priority order and workflow-relative thresholds
Signal registry: declare required inputs per signal (PRD §17)

features.description: PRD Phase 3 — Governance enforcement: suppression defaults, no individual/rank/trend outputs
steps: Suppress on ambiguity; ALLOWED vs SUPPRESSED with reason
Enforce baseline rules (PRD §16): no numeric baseline exposure, no cross-workflow comparison

features.description: PRD Phase 4 — Observability surface: workflow-level aggregated API (GET /api/observability/:org_id)
steps: Expose only workflow-level distributions and allowed interpretations (PRD §7–§8)
Verify no ranking, trends, or individual exposure at API boundary
